info.name: Journal
info.summary: A Markdown journal and personal knowledge workspace for Nextcloud
info.description:
Journal is a private Markdown journal and personal knowledge workspace for Nextcloud.
Features: - Daily entries organized by date - Native Markdown files stored in Nextcloud - YAML Front Matter - Multiple categories - Nextcloud System Tags - Full-text search across content, dates, categories, tags and wikilinks - Nextcloud Text editor - PDF and Markdown export - English, Spanish and German translations
Your content remains accessible as regular Markdown files inside your Nextcloud storage.
info.author: Miguel Torres (Misha)
